context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Worker tool readiness now exposes structured plan-only blockers for agents-as-tools; launch-process ENOENT handling remains folded into pre-publication release notes.
current_tasks: Commit 11a9bf3c added assessWorkerToolReadiness() to @refarm.dev/cli/worker-profile, exporting structured readiness blockers for policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control before runtime-dispatch.
The worker-tool slice kept reusable SDK names product-neutral and left runtime-dispatch hard-blocked until the engine has executable fanout proofs.
after-edit and after-commit finish lanes passed for packages/cli; after-commit hit turbo cache 24/24 with concurrency 2.
Launch-process remains ready for vault-seed-ready preflight with detached spawn ENOENT handled through onError.
next_actions: Use refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json before heavier publication checks; avoid broad gates until another concrete package slice needs them.
Continue auditing vault-seed-ready SDK exports before publication, preferring neutral reusable names and compatibility aliases only when an existing public contract requires them.
For agents-as-tools, consume assessWorkerToolReadiness() as the promotion gate; implement runtime-dispatch only after policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control proofs are local and cheap.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
